steps.title: Treat the name as essential
steps.content: Dennis Chambers is needed to identify which American drummer the sentence is about. Because the name is essential, it should not be set off from drummer with commas.

steps.title: Keep subject and verb together
steps.content: Choice A adds a comma that separates the subject from may be, and Choices C and D wrongly put a comma between drummer and the essential name. The remaining choice uses no punctuation inside the subject. The answer is B.
